name: test_cohorts_readd_to_cohort
description:
Steps to reproduce:
Find a patient in Year 8 and remove them from cohort using the button
Upload a cohort list with their first name, surname, URN, date of birth and postcode

Scenario 1
    Duplicate review is not flagged

    Expected result:
    The child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions
    Actual Result:
    Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort

Scenario 2
    The import screen flags for duplicate review, and user clicks "Review" next to the child's name

    Expected result:
    System allows you to review the new details against the previous record (before removing from cohort) and lets you choose which record to keep. Once review confirmed, the child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions.
    Actual Result:
    Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort
descriptionHtml:
Steps to reproduce:
Find a patient in Year 8 and remove them from cohort using the button
Upload a cohort list with their first name, surname, URN, date of birth and postcode

Scenario 1
Duplicate review is not flagged

Expected result:
The child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions
Actual Result:
Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort

Scenario 2
The import screen flags for duplicate review, and user clicks "Review" next to the child's name

Expected result:
System allows you to review the new details against the previous record (before removing from cohort) and lets you choose which record to keep. Once review confirmed, the child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions.
Actual Result:
Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: <element(s) not found> 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="STONE, Abdul")
statusTrace:
setup_cohort_upload = None
programmes_page = <mavis.test.pages.programmes.ProgrammesPage object at 0x7f4e71e7a9e0>
dashboard_page = <mavis.test.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x7f4e7355b680>
children_page = <mavis.test.pages.children.ChildrenPage object at 0x7f4e73151d30>
import_records_page = <mavis.test.pages.import_records.ImportRecordsPage object at 0x7f4e71e7a060>
test_data = <mavis.test.data.TestData object at 0x7f4e71e53df0>
children = [Child(first_name='Abdul', last_name='STONE', nhs_number='4539019805', address=('Studio 2', 'Reynolds via', 'West Stan...mple.org'), Parent(full_name='Mrs Hazel Taylor', relationship='Mum', email_address='frederickwhittaker@example.com')))]

    @issue("MAV-909")
    @pytest.mark.cohorts
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_cohorts_readd_to_cohort(
        setup_cohort_upload,
        programmes_page,
        dashboard_page,
        children_page,
        import_records_page,
        test_data,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Steps to reproduce:
        Find a patient in Year 8 and remove them from cohort using the button
        Upload a cohort list with their first name, surname, URN, date of birth and postcode
    
        Scenario 1
            Duplicate review is not flagged
    
            Expected result:
            The child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions
            Actual Result:
            Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort
    
        Scenario 2
            The import screen flags for duplicate review, and user clicks "Review" next to the child's name
    
            Expected result:
            System allows you to review the new details against the previous record (before removing from cohort) and lets you choose which record to keep. Once review confirmed, the child is added back into the cohort, and in all the relevant sessions.
            Actual Result:
            Server error page and user cannot bring the child back into the cohort
        """
        child = children[0]
    
        input_file_path, _ = import_records_page.upload_and_verify_output(
            CohortsFileMapping.FIXED_CHILD_YEAR_8
        )
    
        dashboard_page.click_mavis()
        dashboard_page.click_children()
>       children_page.remove_child_from_cohort(child)

        for _ in range(seconds * 2):
            if tag.is_visible():

            time.sleep(0.5)
